mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_health WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY exam_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_health WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_health WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_health WHERE deleted = 0 AND judgment = #{j}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_health (employee_no, worker_name, dept, exam_type, exam_date, exam_org, judgment, cbc_wbc, lens_check, cumulative_dose, after_action, next_exam_date, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{employeeNo}, #{workerName}, #{dept}, #{examType}, #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{examOrg}, #{judgment}, #{cbcWbc}, #{lensCheck}, #{cumulativeDose}, #{afterAction}, #{nextExamDate,jdbcType=DATE}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_health SET employee_no = #{employeeNo}, worker_name = #{workerName}, dept = #{dept}, exam_type = #{examType}, exam_date = #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, exam_org = #{examOrg}, judgment = #{judgment}, cbc_wbc = #{cbcWbc}, lens_check = #{lensCheck}, cumulative_dose = #{cumulativeDose}, after_action = #{afterAction}, next_exam_date = #{nextExamDate,jdbcType=DATE}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_health SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
